title: [ImportVerilog] Add capture analysis pre-pass for functions

features.name: function referencing enclosing scope variable
features.description: Code should include a function or task declared inside a package or module that reads or writes a variable defined in the same enclosing scope

features.name: transitive function capture through call chain
features.description: Code should include a call chain where one function calls another function, and the inner function references a variable in the enclosing package or module scope

features.name: forward reference from function to later variable
features.description: Code should include a function declared before a variable in the same package or module, where the function references that later-declared variable

features.name: task modifying enclosing scope variable
features.description: Code should include a task declared inside a package or module that modifies a variable defined in the same enclosing scope
